zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham於1306年出生在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆時，他的父親Roger de Clifton26歲，母親Margaret de Cailly26歲。他於1316年與Eleanor de Mortimer在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1367年5月11日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham于1306年出生在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆时，他的父亲Roger de Clifton26岁，母亲Margaret de Cailly26岁。他于1316年与Eleanor de Mortimer在英国諾福爾可柏斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1367年5月11日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham was born in 1306, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, his father, Roger de Clifton, was 26 and his mother, Margaret de Cailly, was 26. He married Eleanor de Mortimer in 1316, in Paston, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 May 1367, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham est né en 1306, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Clifton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Cailly, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Mortimer en 1316, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 mai 1367, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham 1306 in Buckenham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Clifton 26 und seine Mutter Margaret de Cailly 26. Er hat 1316 in Paston, Norfolk, England Eleanor de Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Mai 1367 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Buckenham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham è nato il nel 1306 nel Buckenham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Roger de Clifton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Cailly, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Mortimer nel 1316, nel Paston, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 maggio 1367, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenhamが1306年にイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムで生まれた時，父Roger de Cliftonは26歳，母Margaret de Caillyは26歳であった。1316年にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンでEleanor de Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年5月11日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham(이)가 1306년 영국 노르폴크 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Clifton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Cailly(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1316년 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 Eleanor de Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년 5월 11일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 벅함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham nasceu em 1306, em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Clifton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Cailly, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Mortimer em 1316, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de maio de 1367, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham родился в 1306 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Clifton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Cailly, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Mortimer в 1316 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 мая 1367 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham nació en 1306, en Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Clifton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret de Cailly, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Mortimer en 1316, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1367, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
